data.name: Hentai Mermaid Sirena
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Hentai Mermaid Sirena is an erotic puzzle game for adults that will take you deep into the waters of forbidden desire. In the heart of the ocean lives a mermaid named Sirena — gentle, mysterious, and irresistibly seductive. At first, she appears shy and modest, but don’t let her innocent gaze fool you: behind those eyes lies a wild, untamed spirit that slowly begins to reveal itself... piece by piece, puzzle by puzzle.

Each level is a step closer to revelation. You’re not just assembling images — you’re undressing her with your eyes, your fingers, your imagination. Warm water, a half-naked body, wet strands of hair clinging to her chest... With every new image, you move closer to that moment when Sirena unveils herself completely — no barriers, no shame, nothing left to hide.


Key Features:

🔥 30 seductive levels — with every puzzle you solve, Sirena reveals more, turning fantasy into reality.

🏆 30 achievements — mark every moment, every naughty step of your journey.

🖼️ Gallery of pleasure — every unlocked scene stays with you, ready to be enjoyed again and again.

🎯 3 difficulty levels — from smooth relaxation to a true mental challenge. Choose how much you want to tease your fingers and mind:

  • Easy — for quick satisfaction,

  • Normal — for a balanced experience,

  • Hard — for deep, focused pleasure and a real test of your skills.

No matter which mode you choose, Sirena will bare it all — if you can piece every detail together.

Dive into a world where desire knows no limits. Where every puzzle piece reveals a new layer of temptation. Sirena isn’t just a mermaid — she’s your fantasy, coming alive at your fingertips. Relax, feel the tension, piece by piece — and allow yourself to see everything you’ve been dreaming of. She’s waiting... exposed, open, only for you.

data.short_description: 💋 She’s wet, hot, and ready to bare it all just for you. Don’t keep her waiting — take what you’ve been craving.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
